ops.title: P6 (rescoped): autoresearch loop closure via athome autonomous campaign over the watcher score-only lane

ops.description: Rescoped 2026-07-16 per the approved plan (plans/lets-see-what-we-synchronous-cookie.md): loop closure = athome's outer loop (A6a policy-bounded proposer + A6b campaign runner with reservation-based cumulative caps, auto-retros, kill switch) running a campaign policy whose template wraps cc-steer's `--score-only` watcher lane, with `ClaudeCodeDriver` proposing recipe edits. Native `backlog.py` and a bespoke agent contract are NOT built — the agent contract is athome's ProposalPolicy + ExperimentTemplate. Demo bar: ≥2 autonomous watcher experiments proposed → validated → preflighted → run → retro'd under max_total_usd, ledger + cc-notes retros as the oversight trail. Gated on athome A6a/A6b shipping (and C4's sweep lane).
